title: Afrosolen otaviensis
taxonomy: Afrosolen otaviensis belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae, which is a family of flowering plants. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Afrosolen otaviensis specifically belonging to the subfamily Amaryllidoideae. The genus Afrosolen is a relatively small group of plants that are mostly found in southern Africa. Afrosolen otaviensis is a species within this genus and is primarily classified as a bulbous perennial plant. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup, which align with the characteristics of the Amaryllidaceae family.
